briefing.title: *Acuity Capital* — Series B narrative review.
briefing.summary: Saru opens with the pricing slide and the preferred terms; Lin will press cohort retention. Two questions remain — option pool size, and the 1× non-participating preferred — and you need a position on both before the room convenes.
briefing.suggested_followup: Draft the option pool answer for Saru

cards.title: Saru Patel · re: redline
cards.sub: Lin walked the redline. Two open questions remain — the option pool size, and the 1× non-participating preferred. You need a position on both before the 11:00 call.

cards.title: Prep block — pricing slide & cohort table
cards.sub: 45 minutes to fix the pricing slide and the cohort table. Saru flagged the preferred terms; Park is waiting for the cutoff date.

cards.title: Cohort table — owed for slide 14
cards.sub: Park sent the table at 05:40. You owe a cutoff date by 09:30 so slide 14 lands in the 11:00 deck.

cards.title: Debrief — Aria
cards.sub: 30 minutes after the Acuity call. Use the time to consolidate notes from the Series B narrative review.
